hero.title: Language Flashcards
hero.description: Practice vocabulary with focused flashcards designed for active recall.

differences.title: Keep vocabulary practice direct
differences.description: Language Flashcards focuses each practice moment on recalling and reviewing words.

items.title: One card at a time
items.description: Keep attention on the vocabulary currently being practiced.

items.title: Active recall
items.description: Try to remember the meaning before reviewing it.

items.title: Repeatable practice
items.description: Continue through cards to reinforce vocabulary.

feel.title: Focused vocabulary practice
feel.description: The experience keeps the practice loop simple and easy to repeat.

items.title: See the prompt
items.description: Focus on the vocabulary shown on the card.

items.title: Recall the meaning
items.description: Pause and retrieve what you know.

items.title: Review and continue
items.description: Check the card and move to the next practice item.

audiences.title: Who uses Language Flashcards
audiences.description: Useful for learners who want regular vocabulary practice.

items.title: Language learners
items.description: Practice vocabulary as part of daily study.

items.title: Students
items.description: Review words needed for courses and assessments.

items.title: Travelers
items.description: Practice useful vocabulary before and during trips.

resourceSection.title: Vocabulary practice essentials
resourceSection.description: Use a simple card-based flow to reinforce words.

items.title: Recall prompt
items.description: Try to remember before checking the meaning.

groupedSection.title: A clear flashcard routine
groupedSection.description: Move through a repeatable vocabulary practice loop.

items.name: Prompt
items.description: Review the vocabulary presented on the card.

items.name: Check
items.description: Review the card's answer or meaning.

technicalSection.title: Built for focused vocabulary practice
technicalSection.description: Language Flashcards follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.

finalCta.title: Ready to practice vocabulary?
finalCta.description: Open Language Flashcards and begin a focused review.
